meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Escape AI Tool Fatigue (2025)
content.seo_description: Stop drowning in AI tools. Use this Antigravity project template and Claude Code checklist to ship high-end client SaaS apps with elite-level speed.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity template replaces manual boilerplate with an opinionated, high-velocity foundation. By integrating Claude Code, you transform your CLI into an autonomous engineering architect. This workflow eliminates decision fatigue, automates repetitive unit testing, and enforces production-grade architecture, allowing you to deliver complex SaaS features in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
The modern freelancer's workspace has become a graveyard of abandoned AI tools and fragmented workflows. You start with a vision, get lost in a sea of context-switching, and end up with a brittle codebase that scares your clients. The weight of 'choosing the right stack' often paralyzes you before the first line of code is even written.

But what if you could bypass the friction? By treating your development environment as an 'Antigravity' ecosystem, you strip away the noise and focus exclusively on high-value logic. This isn't just about coding faster; it's about architecting a repeatable, resilient system that turns every project into a predictable success story.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the base project structure to ensure modularity and clean separation of concerns before adding logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional SaaS boilerplate with clean architecture, strict TypeScript config, and pre-configured environment variables for production readiness.

steps.title: Define Domain Entities
steps.description: Use the schema definition phase to lock in your data models, preventing scope creep and architectural drift.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define the domain entities for [Feature Name]. Include TypeORM models, Zod validation schemas, and repository patterns for data persistence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate domain entities for user authentication and billing'

steps.title: Automated API Contract Enforcement
steps.description: Ensure your frontend and backend stay in sync by generating type-safe API contracts from your schemas.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate API endpoints using the established domain entities. Enforce strict input validation using Zod and generate OpenAPI documentation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate endpoints and update openapi.yaml'

steps.title: Implement Business Logic Layers
steps.description: Inject your core value proposition into the scaffold using isolated service layers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for [Core Logic]. Ensure the code is decoupled from the controller, uses dependency injection, and includes error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create service layer for payment processing logic'

steps.title: Final QA and Security Hardening
steps.description: Run an automated audit to identify vulnerabilities and edge cases before client delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit on the current codebase. Identify potential injection points, missing auth guards, and performance bottlenecks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit security and fix critical vulnerabilities'

pro_tips: Always use a .claudeignore file to keep your context window lean and focused on business logic.
Map your database schema in a visual tool first; Antigravity excels when fed clear ERD-to-code instructions.
Force Claude Code to write unit tests *before* the implementation code for a true TDD flow that prevents regression.
Use custom system prompts in Claude Code to enforce your specific naming conventions and architectural style guide.
Aggressively delete unused boilerplate generated by AI; keep your codebase minimal to maintain high LLM reasoning accuracy.
content.next_steps: Once your first module is shipped, integrate a CI/CD pipeline to automate your deployment cycle, further reducing the manual overhead of client handoffs.
content.conversion_block: You have the blueprint and the tools to outpace the competition. Stop fighting the complexity and start building the future of SaaS. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
